---
title: "Susan Thomas"
description-meta: "Academic Website for Susan Thomas"
image: "files/images/headshot.jpg"
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: active-projects
    contents: active_projects.yml
    template: home_active_projects.ejs
    sort: false
  - id: latest-paper
    contents: papers.yml
    template: home_recent_paper.ejs
    max-items: 1
    sort: false
  - id: latest-event
    contents: latest_event.yml
    template: home_latest_event.ejs
    sort: false
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 40%
  links:
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}}"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=0QRD90YAAAAJ&hl=en
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai ideas-repec >}}"
      href: https://ideas.repec.org/e/pth170.html
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}}"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3124-6671
      target: _blank
    - text: '<img src="files/images/XKDR_Logomark_RGB_Full_Colour.png" alt="XKDR Forum" height="15">'
      href: https://xkdr.org/
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< fa envelope >}}"
      href: mailto:sthomas.entp@gmail.com
      target: _blank
---


:::{#hero-heading}

I am an economist studying markets, institutions and public finance. My work spans market microstructure, public procurement, insolvency law, and climate finance. I collaborate with researchers and policymakers — reach out if our interests overlap.
:::

```{=html}
<section class="home-section">
  <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; margin-bottom: 1.25rem;">
    <div class="home-section-label" style="margin-bottom: 0;">Active Projects</div>
    <a href="posts.html" style="font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none;">Projects & Initiatives ↗</a>
  </div>
```
:::{#active-projects}
:::
```{=html}
</section>

<section class="home-section">
  <div class="home-section-label">Latest Work</div>
  <div class="home-activity-strip">
```
:::{#latest-paper}
:::
:::{#latest-event}
:::
```{=html}
  </div>
</section>
```
